prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Porsche Performance Software (PPS) Stage 2+ ECU remap** for the **PPM 93.4 kWh battery (engine code: APP3.1)** with custom torque vectoring calibration, increasing peak power from 530 HP to **680 HP** and torque from 479 lb-ft to **640 lb-ft**, while optimizing regenerative braking for track use via **Motec M150** standalone logging.

Install **Magna PT 800V SiC (Silicon Carbide) Inverter Upgrade** with **AP Racing CP9666-1000** carbon-ceramic brake rotors and **Ferodo Racing DS3.12** pads, reducing inverter lag by 18% and improving thermal management under sustained 1.5G lateral loads.

Replace the factory **Porsche 9PA1.1 single-speed transmission** with a **GKN eTwinsterX torque-vectoring differential** and **Quaife ATB helical LSD**, paired with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (285/30 R21 front, 325/25 R22 rear)** tires for sub-2.5s 0-60 mph acceleration and **0.98g skidpad performance**.
estetica: Install **TechArt GTstreet R Aero Kit** (carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with **Vorsteiner V-FF 107** forged 22-inch wheels in **Satin Black with Polished Lip**, reducing drag coefficient to **0.22 Cd** while maintaining OEM active aero functionality.

Replace the factory **Porsche Taycan 4S LED matrix headlights** with **Hella 90mm Bi-Xenon Projector Retrofit** (D1S 85V bulbs) and **Morimoto XB LED Fog Lights**, paired with **3M Crystalline 90 Series** windshield tint for 90% IR rejection and **Llumar ATR 70** side/rear windows.

Full **RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) widebody conversion** using **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Porsche Taycan kit**, featuring **custom-fabricated steel fender flares** (3.5-inch wider front, 4.2-inch wider rear) and **OMP Carbon Fiber Racing Seats (Porsche 992 GT3-spec)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** for FIA compliance.
